content.decision: Old MD rule files in rules/ are kept as deprecated fallback during KB migration. They will be removed after all downstream projects have migrated via leo migrate-kb.
content.context: Claude Code auto-loads files from ~/.claude/rules/ at session start via symlinks. Removing MD rules from the core before downstream projects migrate would break their sessions — no rules loaded, no context. The KB bootloader (CLAUDE.md) handles rule loading for projects that have migrated.
alternatives_considered: Remove MD immediately (option A) — breaks downstream projects
Keep MD forever alongside KB — maintenance burden, risk of divergence
impact: Downstream projects continue working unchanged until they run leo migrate-kb
Two sources of truth temporarily exist — KB docs are canonical, MD files are frozen
After all projects migrate, MD files and rules/ directory can be deleted
